title: gravesia lutea
intro: Gravesia lutea, also known as yellow gravesia, is a plant species in the family Celastraceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and supporting the immune system. Gravesia lutea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
